sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1
items.html: The “separating firmament” is the Parsa placed in the ten Sefirot of each degree by connecting the two points Bina and Malchut. It distinguishes Keter and Hochma in it as male upper water, from the Bina, ZA, and Malchut in it, which is the phase of lower water, females, see answer No. 11 and answer No. 1. (Part 6, Item 9)
